binding_note: Creates a repo-visible non-committed preflight input binding for the already-generated local runtime G3SX30 / elephant MDM2 ESMC embedding artifact. This binding identifies the biological target and local artifact, confirms the approved one-row readiness/preflight input decision, and names the next concrete local artifact preflight check. It does not consume the artifact for analysis and does not promote ready_for_preflight, Gate 8, Gate 9, or any biological claim.
